Name: CRM Lead Enrichment on New Contact
Description: New CRM contact triggers a LinkedIn scrape via Bright Data. Claude extracts title, company and tech stack, updates the CRM and posts a team alert.

Name: AI Agent Web Research Loop
Description: An AI agent browses the web via Bright Data, scrapes multiple pages, summarizes findings, and pushes results to Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable or Slack.

Name: Website Change Monitor and Alert
Description: Scheduled fetch of any URL via Bright Data Web Unlocker, compares it to the previous snapshot, Claude summarizes what changed, and fires a Slack or email alert.

Name: New Job Posting as Outbound Sales Signal
Description: Bright Data scrapes new LinkedIn job postings, Claude qualifies hiring signals as buying intent, drafts a cold email, creates a CRM deal and pings Slack.

Name: Automated News Newsletter
Description: On a schedule, Bright Data searches the web for news, picks the top 5 stories, Claude writes the newsletter as HTML, sent via Beehiiv, ConvertKit, Mailchimp or Gmail.

Name: LinkedIn Lead Enrichment & AI Scoring
Description: A LinkedIn URL in a Google Sheet triggers a Bright Data profile and company scrape, Claude scores the lead 0-100 with a reason, and the row is updated HOT or DONE.

Name: Competitor Teardown (Bright Data)
Description: Give it one competitor and get an opinionated battlecard built only from Bright Data: what they are building (jobs), what customers hate (reviews), how they position (posts and site).

Name: Ask 3 AIs at Once
Description: Send one prompt to ChatGPT, Perplexity and Claude in parallel via Bright Data, see all three answers as cards plus a merged best-of.
